case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. DANIEL PENA RIVERA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PENA RIVERA, DANIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-13-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT DANIEL PENA RIVERA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARED AND REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE AS THE PARTIES ARE WORKING OUT AN AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [VERONICA ROSALES - APPEARING ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF] FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED NOV-15-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PENA RIVERA, DANIEL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL PENA RIVERA IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
